name: Fan Development
preceding_figure_names: Alemana, Basic Movements: Closed, Basic Movements: Open, Cuban Rock LF, Cuban Rocks RF, Cucarachas: LF, Cucarachas: RF, Fencing, Hand To Hand LSP, Hand To Hand RSP, Natural Opening Out Movement, Natural Top, New York LSP, New York RSP, Opening Out To Right And Left, Progressive Walks Back, Progressive Walks Forward, Progressive Walks Forward in LSP, Progressive Walks Forward in RSP, Progressive Walks Forward in Right Shadow Position, Reverse Top, Rope Spinning, Shoulder To Shoulder Left Side, Shoulder To Shoulder Right Side, Side Step To Right commenced with LF, Side Step To Right commenced with RF, Spot or Switch Turn to L (Lady to R), Spot or Switch Turn To R (Lady to L), Syncopated Cuban Rock LF, Syncopated Cuban Rocks RF, Three Alemanas, Three Threes, Underarm Turn To L, Underarm Turn To R
following_figure_names: Alemana, Hockey Stick, Sliding Doors, Fencing, Three Alemanas
notes:
The figure 8 body action should be going on throughout, no pause, stop and restart again. Body needs to be active at all times. It could be slowed down, but not stopped.
Amount of turn: Man may make 1/4 turn L over steps 2 & 3 and 1/8 over steps 5 & 6. Lady: 1/4 L over 2 &3, and 3/8 over 5 & 6.
Alternative timing: holding position on step 3 for count "2", then counting 4-6 "& 3. 4 1".

Notes:
The figure 8 body action should be going on through out, no pause, stop and restart again. Body needs to be active at all times. It could be slowed down, but not stopped.
Rumba Fan Development
Leader
2: LF fwd
3: Transfer weight to RF | 1/8 to L over 2 & 3
4 1: LF to side and slightly back
Man can make 1/4 turn L over steps 2 & 3
4 1: RF to side in Fan Position
Follower
2: RF back
Twisting hip action.
3: Transfer weight to LF | 1/8 to L over 2 & 3
Lady can make 1/4 to L over 2 & 3, turn RF out.
Pendulum hip action.
4 1: RF to side
Twist, pendulum. For basic Bronze Fan, do side and slightly forward. Curving.
2: LF fwd
Twist R hip. Forward check walk on diagonal.
There is a lot of energy toward your partner on this "&" before RF steps back.
LF rotates before RF back.
3: RF back and slightly to side | 1/8 to L
Backward walk action. (2 back walks), squeeze left side to move RF back.
4 1: LF back in Fan Position | 1/8 to L
Squeeze right side to move LF back.
Lady can make 3/8 L over steps 5 & 6

steps.action: Step to side and slightly back
comments: Man can make 1/4 turn L over steps 2 & 3

steps.action: Step to side in Fan Position

comments: Lady can make 1/4 to L over 2 & 3, turn RF out.
Twist, pendulum. For basic Bronze Fan, do side and slightly forward. Curving.
Twist R hip. Forward check walk on diagonal.
There is a lot of energy toward your partner on this "&" before RF steps back.

steps.action: Step back and slightly to side
comments: Backward walk action. (2 back walks), squeeze left side to move RF back.
Squeeze right side to move LF back.
